rbaHistory.note: First cut since Nov 2020 — CPI back in 2-3% band
Held; trimmed mean CPI above target
Held; Q1 CPI surprised to upside

news.title: ASX falls, oil rebounds after US strikes Iran; Kogan jumps, ASX Ltd tanks
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket slipped after the US military said it carried out “self-defence” strikes in southern Iran, triggering doubts about an imminent end to the war.

news.title: ‘Ban the cowboys’: Super giant’s clickbait fight
news.snippet: One of Australia’s largest superannuation funds has demanded a ban on social media financial advice ads after thousands of Australians lost $1bn.

news.title: Liddell power station chimneys come crashing down in controlled explosion
news.snippet: For more than half a century, the Liddell power station burned black coal to generate electricity to power New South Wales. On Tuesday, its two 168-metre tall concrete chimney stacks were demolished.

news.title: CGT carve-outs could extend beyond tech sector, PM says
news.snippet: As the backlash against the Federal Government’s capital gains tax changes continues, Anthony Albanese says carve-outs are on the table.

news.title: OpenAI boss downplays jobs apocalypse as ‘threats of violence’ hit Aussie tech giant
news.snippet: Sam Altman no longer thinks AI will replace workers en masse, but admits businesses are yet to see a return on their massive AI spending.

news.title: Critical Resources jags rich gold and fresh upside in NZ
news.snippet: Critical Resources has defined a new 600-metre arsenic soil anomaly and bagged rock-chip assays up to 5.42g/t gold at its Lammerlaw project in New Zealand.

news.title: Capitalism trumps climate: Why BHP’s green ambitions turned to empty promises
news.snippet: Was then chief executive Andrew Mackenzie just virtue signalling when he declared in 2019 that the mining giant would lead the capitalist pack on greening the world?

news.title: ClearVue cracks booming Indian solar market with major glass pact
news.snippet: ClearVue has entered India through a deal with Aria Glass to locally manufacture and sell its solar glazing products, backed by Aria’s US$240.5M investment in an Indian plant.

news.title: Liberal Joe Hockey backs negative gearing changes
news.snippet: The boss of Australia’s largest bank has made his feelings known on the government's controversial changes to capital gains tax.

news.title: Aguia wins final approval to launch Brazil phosphate sales
news.snippet: Aguia Resources has secured final approval to commercialise its phosphate in Brazil, enabling sales and deliveries through a discounted campaign designed to accelerate cash flow into July 2026.

news.title: Super Netball record broken by 16yo school captain Eva Carneiro
Millions of Aussies to save on power bills
news.snippet: Many Australian households will have lower power bills this winter, but welfare groups says more needs to be done to help the most vulnerable.
